parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_email: $('Validate + Build').item.json.email, p_product: $('Validate + Build').item.json.product, p_company: ($('Validate + Build').item.json.leadRow && $('Validate + Build').item.json.leadRow.company) || $('Validate + Build').item.json.fullName || '' }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: false, status: $json.status || 400, error: $json.error || 'Invalid signup' }) }}

meta.notes: Public SaaS-client signup endpoint. POST /webhook/public/client-signup with { full_name, email, phone?, company?, job_title?, industry?, product, tier?, message?, consent: true }. Creates a 'saas_signup' lead so Mary can qualify-then-provision (avoids fake signups creating real platform accounts). Sends Mary a notification email + sends the signer a welcome auto-reply with 'what happens next' framing. Both emails queue silently if Postmark Production approval hasn't landed yet — they dispatch automatically the moment it does. Product allow-list: sales_engine, sentinel, ava, luxi, maxi, ciro, mga, smart_quote, unspecified. CORS allows crystallux.org + insurance.crystallux.org.
